case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ERIK BUTLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTLER, ERIK HEARING SET FOR FEB-08-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-08-2017 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ERIK BUTLER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, ERIK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1015 OAKDALE AVENUE, APARTMENT G, SAN FRANCISCO, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94124 TOGETHER WITH ALL ATTENDANT STORAGE AND COMMON AREAS $11,014.36 RENT, $315.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $600.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,929.36, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $35.03 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BROWN, ZOE SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR BUTLER, ERIK
